pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Fatmata Koroma is a real person in Sierra Leone's health sector (pharmacy student at University of Sierra Leone and community health worker). Username format is consistent with Sierra Leone naming conventions.

Web search found real person Fatmata Koroma associated with Sierra Leone health system (pharmacy student at University of Sierra Leone, community health worker in Kono District). Fatmata is a verified real first name.
Web search confirmed Fatmata Koroma is a real person in Sierra Leone's health sector. Koroma is a verified real Sierra Leone surname.

Ministry of Health official website (mohs.gov.sl) and contact pages confirm the correct domain is 'mohs.gov.sl' (MOH stands for Ministry of Health, not MOHSL). Official contact email is info@mohs.gov.sl. The metadata incorrectly uses 'mohsl.gov.sl' instead of 'mohs.gov.sl'.

Wikipedia, UN OCHA, and Sierra Leone development encyclopedia confirm Kenema is a real district in the Eastern Province of Sierra Leone with an area of 6,053 km2 and population of 772,472. It is a real administrative organization unit.

Task description confirms the task involves creating a DHIS2 user account, assigning roles, configuring organization units, and managing account access settings - all core user administration and access control functions.

privileged_info_summary: DHIS2 is a real, open-source health information system used in 70+ countries including Sierra Leone. Fatmata Koroma is a real person in Sierra Leone's health sector (pharmacy student at University of Sierra Leone and documented community health worker). Kenema district is a real administrative unit in Eastern Province, Sierra Leone with a population of 772,472. The Ministry of Health official domain is mohs.gov.sl. The email in the metadata contains an error: it uses 'mohsl.gov.sl' instead of the correct domain 'mohs.gov.sl'. The task data is synthetic (creates a test user account in a sandboxed DHIS2 demo environment), but references real geographic locations and a real person's name.
